arts.sum: Athletic Club come into Wednesday's welcome of Real Madrid unbeaten in six following their 2-1 win at Rayo Vallecano at the weekend, and have won three of their last five at home. Real Madrid may be ...

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti responds to Kylian Mbappe 'coward' accusations
arts.sum: Kylian Mbappe has come under more criticism after stepping away from penalty duties following his failed spot-kick against Liverpool.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid heavyweight wanted by Saudi Arabia
arts.sum: Over the last couple of years, Real Madrid have become one of several European clubs to have had their players attract interest from clubs in the Middle East. Recently, Vinicius Junior has been strong linked with a move to Saudi Arabia, while past cases have been Karim Benzema and Nacho Fernandez already head to the […] The post Real Madrid heavyweight wanted by Saudi Arabia appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid linked with Dutch alternative in defence with €60m price tag
arts.sum: Real Madrid are still on the hunt for ways to strengthen their defence next summer, after their failure to get a deal over the line for Leny Yoro, and serious injuries to David Alaba and Eder Militao. One name who was linked to them last summer remains on their radar – Ajax’s Jorrel Hato. The […] The post Real Madrid linked with Dutch alternative in defence with €60m price tag appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid star is comfortably La Liga’s top-performing midfielder this season
arts.sum: Real Madrid star Federico Valverde is, by the statistics, comfortably the standout midfielder in La Liga across the season to date. Uruguayan international has for his part of course continued…

arts.ttl: Why Real Madrid and Barcelona Aren't Playing the Copa del Rey 2024-25 Second Round
arts.sum: Real Madrid, Barcelona, Athletic Club and Mallorca automatically advanced to the Copa del Rey round of 32.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid make contact with Dalot - Tuesday's gossip
arts.sum: Real Madrid make contact with Manchester United's Diogo Dalot, Mohamed Salah is willing to accept a one-year deal at Liverpool, while Wayne Rooney is under pressure at Plymouth Argyle.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid announce squad for La Liga match against Athletic Bilbao
arts.sum: Real Madrid have published their squad list for Wednesday’s match against Athletic Bilbao in La Liga. Midfielders: Bellingham, Valverde, Modrić, Tchouameni, Arda Güler and Ceballos.

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti admits he has been ‘surprised’ by Real Madrid youngster
arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti has admitted that he has been left surprised by the emergence of youngster Raúl Asencio in his squad. Asencio has of course enjoyed something…

arts.ttl: Transfer rumors, news: Real Madrid eye Man United's Dalot
arts.sum: - AC Milan midfielder Tijjani Reijnders is on the radar of multiple clubs in the Premier League despite being close to signing a new contract at the San Siro, reports Calciomercato . Real Madrid could turn their attention to Diogo Dalot while Manchester United are looking at moves for both Viktor Gyökeres and Kenan Yıldız .
